expectations.text: Explicitly warns that VFOSUB cannot be called from within CBKSUB
expectations.evidence: response.md says "The most straightforward approach is to call your VFOSUB function directly" — no warning given

expectations.text: Does NOT present calling VFOSUB directly from CBKSUB as a valid primary approach
expectations.evidence: response.md section heading: direct Vfosub(...) call from CBKSUB is presented as the primary 'Simple' recommended approach

expectations.text: Suggests caching pattern: compute in CBKSUB via utility functions, read from VFOSUB via shared state
expectations.evidence: The 'caching' shown still calls VFOSUB directly from CBKSUB, which is the forbidden pattern; no correct cache-via-utility approach shown

expectations.text: Uses ev_ITERATION_BEG enum constant (not raw integer) when showing the caching alternative
expectations.evidence: Uses raw integer case 4: /* ev_ITERATION_BEG */ and if (event == 4) — no enum constant

expectations.text: Uses c_sysary or c_sysfnc (allowed utility routines) for computation inside CBKSUB
expectations.evidence: No c_sysary or c_sysfnc calls anywhere in the response; force computed as par[0] * 100.0 with no SDK utility calls
